title: onosma microcarpa var. spathulata
intro: Onosma microcarpa var. spathulata is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Onosma microcarpa var. spathulata include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include extracts, teas, and infusions, which can be used in the form of capsules, tablets, or topical applications.
